locator.quote: attenuation from the 0.01-gain orthogonal init collapsed the

text: Actor-head gain=0.01 masks dropout divergence: the attenuation from the 0.01-gain orthogonal init collapsed the signal into ~1e-7 float noise, so the test passed vacuously.

locator.quote: when writing a test that's meant to prove a middle-of-the-network

text: Rule: when writing a test that's meant to prove a middle-of-the-network variance source reaches the output, route the assertion through the head with the largest init gain (the value head, gain=1.0).
